name: Salad Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pizza shell on a pizza pan or platter.
2. Top with the greens.
3. Cover the greens with the chicken.
4. Drizzle with the dressing.
5. Slice and serve.
Yields: 6 to 8 slices
Notes: If using a frozen pizza shell, thaw it and bake in a 450°F oven for 8-10 minutes before adding toppings. A ready-to-top Boboli crust is recommended for extra seasonings and cheese.
